meta.title: Palm Garden — Luxury Resort · El Oued, Algeria
meta.description: Discover Palm Garden, a luxury resort in the heart of the Sahara, in the City of 1000 Domes — El Oued, Algeria.

hero.tagline: An oasis in the heart of the Sahara
hero.subtitle: Luxury resort in El Oued — The City of 1000 Domes

about.title: Welcome to Palm Garden
about.text: Nestled in the heart of Oued Souf, the legendary City of 1000 Domes, Palm Garden is a luxury haven where Algerian tradition meets contemporary comfort. Surrounded by majestic palm groves and bathed in the golden light of the Sahara, our resort offers a unique experience blending traditional architecture, refined cuisine, and absolute relaxation.

accommodation.title: Accommodation
accommodation.subtitle: Unique spaces between tradition and modernity

chalets.name: Chalets
chalets.description: Pyramid-shaped glamping chalets, a unique stay under the Saharan stars with all modern comforts.

domes.name: Domes
domes.description: Iconic geodesic dome rooms with traditional interiors, inspired by the local architecture of Oued Souf.

events.title: Live the Experience
events.successMsg: Your registration is confirmed! Our team will contact you within 24 hours to validate your reservation. Payment is made on site.

restaurant.title: Restaurant & Cafeteria
restaurant.subtitle: Authentic flavors under golden domes
restaurant.text: Under golden domes adorned with sparkling chandeliers, our open air restaurant invites you on a culinary journey through Algerian cuisine. Every evening, enjoy a refined dinner in an intimate atmosphere. In the morning, a generous breakfast buffet awaits you. Our cafeteria is the perfect place to savor mint tea or Turkish coffee.
restaurant.openToAll: Open to all — guests and visitors

booking.title: Reservation
booking.subtitle: Plan your stay or event
booking.successMsg: Thank you for your request. Our team will contact you within 24 hours to confirm your reservation.

footer.tagline: A luxury haven in the heart of the Sahara
